statement: Do not teach Copilot customization workflows to rely on undocumented or unsupported built-in tool names. If guidance mentions a tool that is not in the current documented tool set, replace it with a supported tool path or a terminal fallback.
publicSummary: Generalized from an accepted Copilot audit finding about stale tool guidance.
cautionNotes: Removed all repository-specific references and did not include any private paths or local context.
nonGeneralizationNotes: Specific obsolete tool names and repository context were intentionally omitted.
